MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF M. KARAH'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on November 22, 2013 at 9:30 am. (See SFLR 8.10.) The parties are must deliver courtesy copies of all papers filed in support of and opposition to the motion to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 24, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)
